_description: Pipeline config. denylist is hard-stripped (case-insensitive, whole word). projectPathRoots is a list of path prefixes (relative to /Users/<user>/) under which the next path segment is a project name worth preserving; the path becomes <PATH:project=NAME> instead of <PATH>. excludeProjects names ~/.claude/projects/ directories to skip entirely (e.g. to prevent the wiki citing its own meta-conversations).
